name: MSSQL - Active Directory principals have paths into MSSQL
MSSQL - Owned Active Directory principals have 'MSSQL_HasLogin'
MSSQL - Shortest path from an Active Directory principal to take control of an MSSQL instance
query: MATCH p = shortestPath((n:Base)-[*1..]->(m:MSSQL_Server)) WHERE NOT n = m RETURN p ORDER BY LENGTH(p) DESC LIMIT 1

name: MSSQL -  principals have a path back into Active Directory (e.g., by executing code on the host, abusing stored credentials, etc.)
MSSQL -  Objects does this principal own
MSSQL -  Service Accounts for MSSQL Servers
